holdings.infoBox: IDVZ is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings. The top holdings are Orange stock at 4.26%, Enel SpA at 3.72%, Intesa Sanpaolo at 3.35%, ASML Holding at 3.22%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 3.22%.

overview.description: The Opal International Dividend Income ETF (IDVZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund is actively managed investing in dividend paying companies in the global ex-US space. It aims for capital appreciation and a higher dividend yield compared to the MSCI ACWI ex USA High Dividend Yield Total Return Index IDVZ was launched on Dec 26, 2024 and is issued by Polen.
